name: OPENLANE, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview OPENLANE is a leading digital marketplace for wholesale used vehicles operating in the United States, Canada and Europe. Our technology and people connect the leading automotive manufacturers, dealers, rental companies, fleet operators, captive finance and lending institutions as buyers and sellers to facilitate approximately 1.5 million annual vehicle transactions with a gross merchandise value ("GMV") of $28.8 billion in 2025.
